message:
test: add cross-module integration test for diff snapshots → degradation

Chains DiffSnapshotEngine (DirtyTracker, DiffChain, BaseSnapshot) with
DegradationManager (subsystem health, write queuing, workflow pausing)
to verify the session-resume and failure-recovery pipeline. 6 tests
covering dirty-tracker-driven diff capture, chain restore and compaction,
degradation response to capture failure, full pipeline with recovery,
pane lifecycle events, and degradation escalation to critical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
